message:
feat(vmap,lax): add in_axes/out_axes to vmap and rewrite while_loop with functional API

Extend vmap to support per-argument in_axes and per-output out_axes
with AxisSpec enum (Batched/NotBatched), negative-axis resolution, and
validation for bounds/count mismatches. General case uses loop-and-stack
with arbitrary-axis slicing via transpose; fast path remains for uniform
axis-0 BatchTrace. Rewrite while_loop with extracted op parsers (adding
div, pow, ne, eq), a public eval_while_loop_functional API accepting
closures for condition/body with multi-element Vec<Value> carry, and
shape-preservation guards with MaxIterationsExceeded/ShapeChanged errors.
Add error distribution histograms to conformance tolerance reporting with
log-scale buckets from 1e-15 through infinity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
